description: Queen Patch 2 (5 February 2020) — Portal Binding Changes, Wardrobe Skin Changes, Yellow Zone Dungeon Fixes, Additional Crystal League Timeslots Added, Changes to Royal Armors and Faction Capes, Improvements, Changes, Combat Balance Changes, Fixes.

sections.heading: Portal Binding Changes

items.text: The portal binding reset cooldown period has been reduced from 30 days to 7 days

sections.searchable_text: Portal Binding Changes The portal binding reset cooldown period has been reduced from 30 days to 7 days

sections.heading: Wardrobe Skin Changes
sections.searchable_text: Wardrobe Skin Changes Hellgates Crystal League Matches City Fights Arena Expeditions

sections.heading: Yellow Zone Dungeon Fixes
sections.searchable_text: Yellow Zone Dungeon Fixes Lewsdon Hill Snapshaft Trough Sleetwater Basin

sections.heading: Additional Crystal League Timeslots Added
sections.searchable_text: Additional Crystal League Timeslots Added 2:00 UTC 2:30 UTC (new) 13:00 UTC 13:30 UTC (new) 20:00 UTC 20:30 UTC (new)

sections.heading: Changes to Royal Armors and Faction Capes

items.text: Reduced crafting times and adjusted item power for Royal Armors and Faction Capes to bring them in line with other armors
Doubled the rune, soul, and relic cost of enchanting for Royal Armors (intended to go live with the Queen update but not implemented)

sections.searchable_text: Changes to Royal Armors and Faction Capes Reduced crafting times and adjusted item power for Royal Armors and Faction Capes to bring them in line with other armors Doubled the rune, soul, and relic cost of enchanting for Royal Armors (intended to go live with the Queen update but not implemented)

sections.heading: Improvements

subitems.text: Gatekeeper Respawn time: 15min → 10min
Max number of Spawns per cycle: 80 → 100

stats.name: Max number of Spawns per cycle

subitems.text: Gatekeeper Respawn time: 8min → 6min
Max number of Spawns per cycle: 80 → 100

stats.name: Max number of Spawns per cycle

items.text: Hideout player is currently in is under attack

sections.searchable_text: Improvements Outlands Greater (5v5) Hellgate Gatekeeper Respawn time: 15min → 10min Max number of Spawns per cycle: 80 → 100 Outlands Lesser (2v2) Hellgate Gatekeeper Respawn time: 8min → 6min Max number of Spawns per cycle: 80 → 100 Hideout is low on food Hideout player is currently in is under attack

sections.heading: Changes

items.text: Realmgate areas that previously displayed as "Conquerors' Hall Lv.1" are now called "[City] Realmgate" for clarity - this also improves clarity of related popups, such as portal lock warnings
Reduced the rate of vanity capes in the loot table of Randomized Dungeon chests
Avalonian Archer's cooldown for knocking back close players increased to 2 seconds (was 1 second)
The following Crystal Realm statistics were moved to a new "Archive" section below other stats

subitems.text: Crystal Realm Battles
Crystal Realm Kills
Crystal Realm Kill Fame
Crystal Realm Fame as an Ally
Behavior is now the same as other damage reflections in the game
Certain spells can no longer be reflected
This change is intended to solve unintended chaining of reflect events

sections.searchable_text: Changes Realmgate areas that previously displayed as "Conquerors' Hall Lv.1" are now called "[City] Realmgate" for clarity - this also improves clarity of related popups, such as portal lock warnings Reduced the rate of vanity capes in the loot table of Randomized Dungeon chests Avalonian Archer's cooldown for knocking back close players increased to 2 seconds (was 1 second) The following Crystal Realm statistics were moved to a new "Archive" section below other stats Crystal Realm Battles Crystal Realm Kills Crystal Realm Kill Fame Crystal Realm Fame as an Ally Changes to Thorns (Nature Staff) Behavior is now the same as other damage reflections in the game Certain spells can no longer be reflected This change is intended to solve unintended chaining of reflect events

sections.heading: Combat Balance Changes

subitems.text: Cast Time: 0s → 0.8s
Standtime: 0.8s → 0s
Hit Delay: 0.8s → 0s

sections.searchable_text: Combat Balance Changes Hunting Instinct (Snow Husky) Cast Time: 0s → 0.8s Standtime: 0.8s → 0s Hit Delay: 0.8s → 0s

sections.heading: Fixes

subitems.text: Fixed an issue where spell hit indications were not shown correctly for some instant-cast spells (e.g. Frost Bomb)
"Hostile" actions with friendly players no longer count as combat actions - this fixes a bug where getting killed shortly after a "friendly" smoke bomb resulted in a 3-minute knockdown countdown
Fixed an issue where the spell "Opening to Hell" (Demon Cape) did not affect mounted players
Fixed an issue where the second hit of "Devastating Strike" (Black Hands) didn't trigger if the stun was cleansed
Fixed a bug that prevented "Defensive Slam" (Maces) from affecting mounted players
Fixed an issue where "Scent of the Wilderness" (Skinner Workboots) remained active when mounted

items.text: Fixed an issue where Level 2 and 3 Hideouts did not show damaged state until two or more shields were lost
Fixed an issue that resulted in lower tier common fish in some T7 ocean fishing areas
Crafting Avalonian items now fills the related laborer journal as intended
Avalonian Energy is no longer returned by crafting focus, as intended
Lowered Avalonian Energy requirement of non-enchanted T7 Avalonian Omelettes by 25 to their intended value
Gathering enchanted stone now fills Stone Trophy journals as intended
Large rhinos in Hide Dens were replaced with Desert Wolves as intended
Numerous additional animation, terrain, graphical, audio, and localization fixes
